welcome.subject: The First Edition: Welcome to VICOO
welcome.body_intro: You have just joined a movement where children's raw creativity meets the principles of sustainable craftsmanship.
welcome.body_main: At VICOO, we don't just showcase art; we transform it into a tangible legacy of hope.

recovery.subject: VICOO Account Recovery
recovery.title: Your password hint or temporary access
recovery.content: You requested a password recovery. Your current password hint or access key is shown above. Please use it to log in and change your password.
